name: write-code-by-hand
description: Natural-language editor skills for human-authored code changes and enterprise-grade cursor governance.

interface.shortDescription: Human-authored code with AI-mediated cursor governance
interface.longDescription: Use Write Code By Hand for a strict editor operating model: the agent can inspect files, move a cursor, and apply exact human-authored edits, but it cannot invent code, answer engineering questions, or convert intent into software.
defaultPrompt: Use write-code-by-hand to edit this repository by hand.
Enter the editor operating model and wait for exact edits.
